author: misilva73
content:
Did a major rewrite to 2780 here: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11645

After some back and forth of client optimizations, it is becoming likely that having eth transters cheaper than the current 21k will not be possible. I update the eip flavor to match this and also added the most likely numbers based on what I am seeing in optimizations. 

This rewrite should also cover the issues already raised by <@429719902363058177> and <@830368514225340436> . Would love to have your feedback there. Also <@316280621783580673>, when you are back, let me know what you think
